name: codex-browser-recorder
description: Save one explicitly approved Codex Browser test flow as a local H.264 MP4 recording.

interface.shortDescription: Save an approved Browser test flow as local MP4.
interface.longDescription: Saves one explicitly approved Codex Browser test flow as a validated, audio-free H.264 MP4 in a user-visible local folder.
defaultPrompt: Use $record-browser to record one approved non-sensitive flow on a public HTTPS test page.
Use $record-browser to save one approved same-origin navigation flow as a local MP4.
Use $record-browser to save one approved loopback development flow as a local MP4.
